summary: Phase 11 Manual QR Payment System — full backend + frontend regression completed. 17/17 pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_phase11.py PASS (payment mode public/toggle, admin settings round-trip, QR upload/delete/serve without auth, user quote for one-time program + 409 on subscription, screenshot upload, submit + duplicate 409, pending & history lists, admin summary, admin list, approve + purchase row assertions + re-approve 409 + subsequent-quote 409 + user notification found, reject → status/reason persisted → user can re-submit, BRV still 36/36 PASS). Frontend Playwright verified every acceptance criterion: (a) Admin: /admin/payment-settings renders admin-payment-settings-page with payment-mode-select='Manual QR Payment', qr-company-input='RIYORA Wellness Pvt Ltd', qr-upi-input='riyorawellness@hdfc', qr-preview-img has src pointing at /api/uploads/screenshot/qr-<uuid>.png, and both admin-nav-payment-verify + admin-nav-payment-settings nav entries exist. (b) /admin/payment-verifications renders admin-pending-payments-page with sum-pending tile, tabs, table; clicking pv-approve-<id> opens pv-action-dialog, clicking pv-confirm-btn shows 'Payment approved · program unlocked' toast, row disappears from Pending tab, pending tile count goes from 1 → 0. pv-view-<id> opens pv-viewer-dialog showing the screenshot image. (c) User (7802655202): after login the one-time program detail page shows 'Pay via QR' button labelled correctly (not 'Purchase'); clicking navigates to /app/pay/<id> which renders pay-manual-qr-page, pay-breakdown-card, pay-qr-card, pay-qr-image, pay-copy-upi-btn, pay-done-btn. Clicking pay-done-btn shows pay-form-card; filling UTR + uploading PNG via pay-screenshot-input + clicking pay-submit-btn reveals pay-success-card. /app/home then shows home-pending-payments card. /app/payment-history renders payment-history-page with the new item showing 'Pending Verification' badge. (d) Inner Peace subscription program detail shows program-coming-soon-badge; no 'Pay via QR' / 'Purchase' button; legacy subscribe-monthly-btn / subscribe-yearly-btn testids are absent.
critical_code_review_comments: manual_payments.py serve_router.get('/screenshot/{filename}') has NO auth by design (documented) — filenames are UUIDv4 tokens (~10^38 keyspace) making enumeration infeasible. Acceptable for MVP but consider signed URLs with short TTL if any screenshot ever contains PII (bank statement crops etc.).

manual_payments.py test_admin_toggle_payment_mode temporarily flips the global payment mode to 'razorpay' before reverting. If a real user hits /programs during that ~200ms window the ProgramDetail page would render 'Purchase' instead of 'Pay via QR'. Non-blocking for testing, but worth noting for production QA windows.

manual_payments.py admin_action() calls create_commissions_for_purchase inside a try/except with only logger.exception on failure — if commissions silently fail the admin still sees success=approved and the purchase row is created. Recommend surfacing a warning field like {'success':true, 'commission_engine_ok': false} so admin dashboards can flag it.

PayManualQR.jsx uses navigator.clipboard.writeText inside a click handler — on some mobile WebViews this can throw when secure-context is missing. Wrap in try/catch and fallback to document.execCommand('copy') to prevent an unhandled promise rejection.

phase11.py PaymentSubmitRequest.transaction_date is typed as plain `str` with no ISO-date validation — a malformed date silently gets stored and later throws when the frontend tries to `new Date(...)` in PaymentHistory.jsx. Consider using `datetime.date` or a `constr(pattern=…)`.

PaymentSettingsUpsert allows an admin to POST is_active=False, which would deactivate the only active row and cause GET /payments/manual/qr to return 503 for all users. Suggest guarding via a soft check that at least one active row must remain.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on functional acceptance criteria (admin payment-settings, admin payment-verifications approve + view dialogs, user Pay-via-QR flow end-to-end, home pending card, payment history, subscription Coming Soon)

test_credentials: Admin 9999999999/Admin@12345, User 7802655202/Passw0rd! (RW001798) — both worked. Backend tests read REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from env; command: `cd /app && REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) python -m pytest backend/tests/test_phase11.py -v -o addopts=''` (the empty addopts override is required because backend/pytest.ini forces `-n auto --dist loadscope` which breaks with our fixture-passed-via-pytest module attributes).
seed_data_creation: During testing: (1) admin settings payment_instructions round-tripped and reverted to seeded value. (2) Payment mode toggled 'razorpay' → back to 'manual_qr'. (3) One QR PNG (1x1) uploaded (leftover — replaces prior seed QR; admin can re-upload the real QR any time). (4) One approved payment_request + program_purchases row via UI test. (5) One rejected + one re-submitted payment_request via backend tests. All are TEST_ prefixed programs — production programs untouched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 11 is fully verified end-to-end. The 1x1 test PNG uploaded as QR looks visually blank in the admin QR preview and the user Pay page — this is EXPECTED (it's a valid 1x1 pixel image, not a real QR). Ask admin to re-upload the real production QR image before launch. When testing further phases, remember the login response shape is `{user|admin, tokens:{access_token, refresh_token, token_type}}` — flat `access_token`/`token` keys do NOT exist. LocalStorage keys used by frontend: `rw_access_token`, `rw_refresh_token`, `rw_role`. Backend pytest.ini forces xdist which broke fixture-passed test state (pytest.shared_pending_request_id) — pass `-o addopts=''` to disable it.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — feature verification pass; no bug reported.
